mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO chat_messages ( message_id, room_id, sender_id, message_type, message_text, reply_to_message_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{messageText}, #{replyToMessageId}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_message_attachments SET message_id = #{messageId}, attachment_status = 'ATTACHED', attached_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND attachment_status = 'TEMP' AND attachment_id IN
#{attachmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO chat_message_reactions ( room_id, message_id, requester_user_id, reaction_type, reaction_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{messageId}, #{requesterUserId}, #{reactionType}, #{reactionCode}, NOW() )
